ValidationRule.description: Display & Mandatory ONLY If ((SFDRcategory=8 OR 9)) > Va rentrer en conflit avec le mandatory conditionel
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPESG , Name = "Proposal", OR(ISPICKVAL(ProjectProductParent__r.SFDRcategory__c , '8'),ISPICKVAL(ProjectProductParent__r.SFDRcategory__c , '9')), OR( ISBLANK(MinTaxAlignment__c), ISNULL(ESGLabel__c), ISNULL(FundSpecificExclusions__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If SFDRcategory=8 OR 9, please provide Minimum Taxonomy Alignment (20450), ESG Label (20060) and Fund Specific Exclusions.
